description: SEED-style personal 32-channel EEG emotion calibration paradigm for realtime music and video regulation.
design_principle: Use discrete video-induced emotion targets first, then use self-report to accept, reject, or mark ambiguous trials. Do not create training labels by hard-cutting all trials on DEAP-style valence/arousal thresholds.

trial_quality_policy.uncertain: Keep metadata and EEG, but exclude from first supervised classifier training.
trial_quality_policy.rejected: Exclude from training and inspect stimulus/artifact quality.
trial_quality_policy.artifact_rejected: Exclude when EEG artifact flags or missing trigger timestamps are present.

sessions.name: baseline_induction
sessions.purpose: Collect labeled personal EEG under controlled video induction.

sessions.name: regulation_feedback
sessions.purpose: Validate online emotion recognition and music/video regulation effects.

classes.uncertain_if: valence is 5 or arousal is 6; keep for audit but exclude from first classifier.
valence is 5 or arousal is 5; keep for audit but exclude from first classifier.
valence is below 5 or arousal is 5; keep for audit but exclude from first classifier.
valence is 5 or arousal is above 8; keep for audit but exclude from first classifier.

training_recommendation.selection_metric: validation balanced accuracy with per-class confusion review
training_recommendation.minimum_live_gate: Use live regulation only when validation confidence is acceptable; otherwise fall back to mock/label-driven mode.
